data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the acceptance workflow for substitutes, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, but there is no evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this capability. Specifically, the absence of any evidence showing that substitutes can accept or decline offers indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow for substitutes to accept or decline offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
